description: RDI Python/FastMCP project standards — declarative compliance checks

checks.name: Dockerfile has USER directive
checks.description: Dockerfile must switch to a non-root user via USER directive
checks.remediation: Add: RUN useradd -m appuser && chown -R appuser:appuser /app\nUSER appuser

checks.name: Dockerfile USER is not root
checks.description: Dockerfile USER directive must not be set to root
checks.remediation: Change USER root to USER appuser (create user first with useradd)

checks.name: No hardcoded secrets
checks.description: Source files must not contain hardcoded API keys or tokens
checks.remediation: Move secrets to .env files or GCP Secret Manager

checks.name: Frozen dependency install
checks.description: Dockerfile uv sync must use --frozen or --no-dev to prevent uncontrolled dep resolution
checks.remediation: Change 'uv sync' to 'uv sync --frozen --no-dev' in Dockerfile

checks.name: Docker layer caching
checks.description: Dockerfile should copy dependency files before source for layer caching
checks.remediation: Add: COPY pyproject.toml uv.lock* /app/ before COPY . /app

checks.name: CI lint/test workflow
checks.description: Project must have a CI workflow that runs linting and tests
checks.remediation: Copy ci-python.yml from rdi-dev-env/templates/github-workflows/

checks.name: Security scan workflow
checks.description: Project must have a security scanning workflow
checks.remediation: Copy security-python.yml from rdi-dev-env/templates/github-workflows/

checks.name: Gemini code review workflow
checks.description: Project must have automated AI code review on PRs
checks.remediation: Copy gemini-code-review.yml from rdi-dev-env/templates/github-workflows/

checks.name: uv from official image
checks.description: Dockerfile should install uv from the official container image, not pip
checks.remediation: Replace 'pip install uv' with 'COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:latest /uv /uvx /bin/'

checks.name: Build system in pyproject.toml
checks.description: pyproject.toml must declare a [build-system] section
checks.remediation: Add [build-system]\nrequires = ["setuptools>=61.0"]\nbuild-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

checks.name: Pydantic Settings
checks.description: Project should use pydantic-settings for configuration
checks.remediation: Add pydantic-settings>=2.0 to project dependencies

checks.name: Settings getter pattern
checks.description: Config module should expose a get_settings() accessor for the singleton
checks.remediation: Add: def get_settings() -> Settings:\n    return settings

checks.name: Conftest env reset
checks.description: Test conftest.py should reset environment and re-instantiate Settings singleton
checks.remediation: Add autouse fixture that monkeypatches env and re-instantiates config.settings = Settings()

checks.name: Makefile present
checks.description: Project must have a Makefile with standard targets
checks.remediation: Copy and customize Makefile from rdi-dev-env/templates/python-fastmcp/

checks.name: No python-dotenv
checks.description: Projects using pydantic-settings should not also use python-dotenv for env loading
checks.remediation: Remove load_dotenv() calls — pydantic-settings handles .env loading via model_config

checks.name: uv.lock committed
checks.description: uv.lock should be committed for reproducible builds
checks.remediation: Run 'uv lock' and commit the resulting uv.lock file

checks.name: CLAUDE.md present
checks.description: Project should have a CLAUDE.md for Claude Code context
checks.remediation: Copy and customize CLAUDE.md from rdi-dev-env/templates/python-fastmcp/

checks.name: AGENTS.md present
checks.description: Project should have an AGENTS.md for shared agent context
checks.remediation: Copy and customize AGENTS.md from rdi-dev-env/templates/

checks.name: GEMINI.md present
checks.description: Project should have a GEMINI.md for Gemini review standards
checks.remediation: Copy and customize GEMINI.md from rdi-dev-env/templates/

checks.name: Dependabot config
checks.description: Project should have dependabot.yml for automated dependency updates
checks.remediation: Copy dependabot.yml from rdi-dev-env/templates/github-workflows/

checks.name: Stale workflow
checks.description: Project should have a stale PR/issue cleanup workflow
checks.remediation: Copy stale.yml from rdi-dev-env/templates/github-workflows/

checks.name: RDI baseline marker
checks.description: Project should have .rdi-baseline tracking adoption version
checks.remediation: Create .rdi-baseline with adoption version and any suppressed checks

fields.suppress: Array of check IDs to suppress with reason strings

suppress.reason: Alembic env.py needs load_dotenv for standalone execution
